title: Brailix braille profile
description: External structure of a profile JSON — the braille standard as data: rule-table references plus feature switches. This schema owns STRUCTURE only; semantic constraints (referenced table files exist and are well-formed, entity references resolve, feature values make sense to their domain) belong to brailix.core.config.validator, so every rule lives in exactly one place.

name.description: The profile's own authoritative identity (may differ from the file name when loaded via an alias).

language.description: Language tag (e.g. zh-CN, ja-JP). Must contain at least one non-space character; the primary subtag selects the language frontend/backend slot.

features.description: Open feature switches grouped by domain (math / zh / music / input / ...). Deliberately unconstrained here: the feature space is the profile system's extension point and each domain owns its keys.

tables.description: Braille rule tables. Each entry is a resource reference (a path like resources/cells.json or resources/music/vocal/), an inline cell spec (e.g. c_36), or a per-domain group of such references (zh / math / music / a per-language slot). Keys with a leading underscore are metadata (e.g. a language slot's _required group list) and are skipped by the loaders.

reference.description: Citation for the standard this profile implements.
